mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ledger_tx (id, merchant_id, tx_type, reference_type, reference_id, memo, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{merchantId}, #{txType}, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId}, #{memo}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO ledger_entry (tx_id, account_id, asset_code, direction, amount, balance_after, created_at) VALUES (#{txId}, #{accountId}, #{assetCode}, #{direction}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, merchant_id AS "merchantId", tx_type AS "txType", reference_type AS "referenceType", reference_id AS "referenceId", memo, created_at AS "createdAt" FROM ledger_tx WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, tx_id AS "txId", account_id AS "accountId", asset_code AS "assetCode", direction, amount, balance_after AS "balanceAfter", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM ledger_entry WHERE tx_id = #{txId} ORDER BY id ASC
